title: Add status update with resolution/progress detail notes

requirements.summary: Add admin-only 'Update Status' section to Complaint Detail page with form for status updates (dropdown, updatedBy field, details textarea) and status log history table displaying past entries ordered newest to oldest
acceptanceCriteria: The 'Update Status' section is visible only to admin-role users on the Complaint Detail page.
The form includes a Status dropdown with options: Pending, In Progress, Resolved.
The form includes an 'Updated By' text field and a 'Details / Remarks' textarea.
Submitting the form calls `updateComplaintStatus` with the correct arguments.
After a successful update, the complaint's current status badge on the page reflects the new status.
The status log history table displays all past status entries with Status, Updated By, Date & Time, and Details columns.
The status log entries are ordered from newest to oldest.

file_operations.description: Add a new React Query mutation hook `useUpdateComplaintStatus` that calls `actor.updateComplaintStatus(complaintNumber, newStatus, updatedBy, details)` and invalidates the complaint detail and list queries on success. The hook should accept parameters for complaintNumber, newStatus (ComplaintStatus enum), updatedBy (string), and details (string).

Add an 'Update Status' section visible only when `isAdmin` is true. Include a form with a Status dropdown (Pending, In Progress, Resolved using ComplaintStatus enum values), an 'Updated By' text input, and a 'Details / Remarks' textarea. Wire the form submission to call `useUpdateComplaintStatus` mutation with the complaint number and form values. Below the form, add a status log history table with columns: Status, Updated By, Date & Time, Details. Map over `complaint.statusLog` in reverse order (newest first) to display each entry. Use the `formatTimestamp` utility from `frontend/src/lib/utils.ts` to display dates. Show loading/error states for the mutation. After successful update, the page should automatically refresh to show the new status badge and updated log.
